full_video_archive_policy: not archived; YouTube URL retained as canonical public video source

knowledge_hooks.hook: Use Paan KL when a restaurant asks for ROI; accurate geotracked attendance can show direct labour-cost impact.
knowledge_hooks.pain: Paper hour tracking made accurate staff payment and part-timer payroll difficult.
knowledge_hooks.outcome: Geotracked clock-in/out saved payroll time and was estimated to save about 15% in part-time labour cost.
knowledge_hooks.best_fit_prospect_pattern: MY restaurant teams with paper hours, part-timer payroll, attendance accuracy, or labour-cost control pain.
